Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: So the cases with significantly longer durations are 2002 26 hours 2003 48 5 hours and 2005 77 hours The short ones are 2001 and 2004

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Complexity Low 2001 2004 fast Medium 2002 26h High 2003 and 2005 48 5h and 77h So complexity clearly correlates with duration High complexity claims have multiple Request Additional Documents events

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Multiple document requests appear only in High and Medium complexity cases

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Comparing 2003 Region A and 2005 Region B both High complexity 2005 takes longer 77h vs 48 5h and has more requests 3 vs 2

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Region alone does not determine speed but combined with complexity and resource may matter

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Adjuster Lisa is associated with both fast 2004 and very slow 2005 cases Adjuster Mike is associated with both fast 2001 and slow 2003 cases So resource alone is not the sole cause

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lisa requests are spread over multiple days in 2005 while Mike requests in 2003 are on the same day

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This suggests either less efficient document management or longer customer response cycles in that region resource pairing

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Region B handles both the fastest low complexity and the slowest high complexity so Region B is not a clear independent root cause

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The primary driver is claim complexity evidenced by the presence and repetition of Request Additional Documents

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: High complexity claims involve incomplete initial submissions requiring iterative documentation The time between requests accumulates and extends lead time

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Adjuster Lisa in Region B may have higher workload less streamlined follow up processes or customers in Region B may respond slower

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Approval manager does not seem to be the main differentiator because the largest delays appear in the documentation loop before approval

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Implement upfront document checklists for high complexity claims to reduce iterations

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Assign dedicated senior adjusters to complex cases improve customer communication channels in Region B and monitor adjuster workload and request turnaround times
